Shiny apps

A visual archive of my submissions to the annual #30DayChartChallenge — one chart a day for 30 days across five themes.

Looking for the #30DayChartChallenge submissions year by year? See the Chart Challenge archive.

Topic
Tool

—

Loading gallery…

All charts loaded

The #30DayChartChallenge is a community-driven data visualization initiative where participants create one chart a day for 30 days, following a prompt grouped into five weekly themes: Comparisons, Distributions, Relationships, Time Series, and Uncertainties. Source code on GitHub.
2026 2025

Open-source R packages for Brazilian economic data, time series analysis, and ggplot2 visualization themes.

realestatebr

Access to Brazilian real estate market data from multiple official sources: the Central Bank of Brazil (BCB), ABRAINC, ABECIP, FGV/IBRE, and the Bank for International Settlements (BIS). All datasets are returned in a tidy format via a single get_dataset() interface.

Data CRAN Stable
Package website GitHub

trendseries

Extract trends from monthly and quarterly economic time series. Provides augment_trends() for pipe-friendly tibble workflows and extract_trends() for ts objects. Includes HP, Hamilton, Baxter-King, Christiano-Fitzgerald, Kalman, STL, and moving averages, with smart defaults following Ravn & Uhlig (2002).

Time series CRAN Stable
Package website GitHub

metrosp

Passenger demand data for the São Paulo metro system covering 2012–2026. Datasets include monthly line totals, average weekday station entries, daily station counts, and spatial geometries for metro and commuter train lines and stations.

Data CRAN Stable
Package website GitHub

insperplot

Extends ggplot2 with Insper's visual identity. Custom themes, color palettes (qualitative, sequential, and diverging), and specialized plotting functions for academic and institutional use.

Visualization Stable
Package website GitHub

benviplot

ggplot2 scale functions and a custom theme derived from the Benvi visual identity of QuintoAndar Group (discontinued in 2024). Qualitative, sequential, and diverging palettes with both discrete and continuous scale variants. Includes Poppins font support and high-level chart helpers.

Visualization Stable
Package website GitHub

ekioplot

ggplot2 implementation of EKIO's visual identity. Professional themes, curated color palettes, and scale functions for ggplot2 and gt tables. Smart font detection with safe fallbacks and high-level recipe functions for common chart types.

Visualization Developing
GitHub

stratr

Companion to {rppi} that builds geographic strata for a property price index using the 2010 Brazilian Census weighting area definitions. Addresses known inconsistencies in the original weighting structure.

Census Stable
GitHub

odsp

Import, clean, and work with São Paulo Origin-Destination survey data in R. Provides a consistent interface to OD data for mobility analysis and urban transport research.

Data Developing
GitHub

Vinicius Oike Reginatto

I’m an economist and data scientist based in São Paulo, Brazil. I write about economics, urban analytics, and the real estate market — mostly through data visualization with R.

Read the blog · Browse the chart gallery · Learn ggplot2 · About me

Interactive dashboards and data exploration tools built with R Shiny.

Atlas Brasil

Interactive map of socioeconomic and demographic indicators across Brazil's metropolitan regions. Data from the Atlas of Human Development (PNUD, IPEA, FJP), covering Census 2000 and 2010 with income adjusted for inflation.

Urban Stable Shiny
Open app GitHub

IDH dos municípios

Dashboard for exploring the Firjan Municipal Development Index (IFDM) across Brazilian municipalities. The IFDM follows a methodology similar to the UN's HDI but is calculated annually, covering employment, education, and health dimensions.

Municipal Stable Shiny
Open app GitHub

Painel do Mercado Imobiliário

Dashboard for monitoring the Brazilian real estate market. Tracks property price indices, credit flows, and housing indicators from multiple official sources, built on top of the realestatebr package.

Real estate Developing Shiny
GitHub

SPOD Dashboard

Interactive dashboard for the São Paulo Origin-Destination Survey (Pesquisa OD). Visualizes travel patterns, modal splits, and mobility flows across the metropolitan region, built on top of the odsp package.

Mobility Developing Shiny
GitHub
